description_long: This is a robust, stylized wooden cup reinforced with thick, black metallic bands at the top and bottom. The cylindrical body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each displaying a natural wood grain and subtle carved details. The cup features a prominent, angular handle made of the same black metal, attached securely to the side. Decorative circular rivets are evenly spaced along the metal bands, adding both structural integrity and visual interest. The interior appears to be lined with the same dark metal, suggesting durability and suitability for holding liquids. The overall design evokes a medieval or fantasy aesthetic, making it suitable for themed urban taverns or outdoor markets.
description: A sturdy wooden cup with black metal bands, decorative rivets, and a large angular handle, evoking a medieval or fantasy style.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the circular opening, thick black metal rim, and the wood grain of the staves.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the large, angular black metal handle and the decorative rivets on the metal bands.
description_view_2: The back view shows the handle attachment and the full width of the metal bands, with the wood staves visible between them.
description_view_3: Another side view, focusing on the handle's texture and the detailed wood grain, with the rivets and metal bands clearly visible.
